title: odontoglossum mixturum
intro: Odontoglossum mixturum, also known as the Tiger Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the Oncidiinae subtribe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Odontoglossum mixturum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of tinctures or infusions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
